prompt: Create a cinematic anime-style night scene in a horizontal 3:2 composition. A quiet teenage boy with messy dark brown hair sits in profile on a wide wooden window ledge inside a dim room, wearing a loose dark hoodie and pants, holding a warm mug with both hands and looking out through an open wooden window. His face is softly shadowed and not detailed. On the ledge near him are exactly 3 visible objects: an open book lying flat in the foreground, a small glowing lantern on the left, and the mug in his hands. Outside, show a sprawling hillside town at night with old stone houses and red-tiled roofs, warm lit windows, low garden walls, trees, and a wet winding road that starts near the foreground and snakes down through the town toward a distant bay or lake between dark mountains. Include exactly 5 prominent street lamps: one tall glowing lamp on the far right foreground, three smaller lamps following the road through the middle distance, and one faint lamp farther down the road. The sky is deep navy blue with scattered stars, layered clouds, and a thin orange glow on the horizon after sunset. Use rich warm-and-cool contrast: golden lamplight and window glow reflecting on the rain-slick road and polished wood, against cool blue moonlit mountains and sky. Highly detailed painterly anime background art, cozy melancholic atmosphere, realistic perspective depth, soft bloom around lights, no text, no watermark, no modern vehicles or crowds.
